programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #6 Dragon of Doom
programme.desc: On the bottom of the ocean, within the sunken Titanic, the golden dragon statue waits. When Lupin and the gang are hired to retrieve it, Goemon recognizes the dragon as one of his clan's treasures. Now, he's ready to fight his own friends to protect it!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #7 The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
programme.desc: To retrieve the Harimao's Treasure, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather the statues.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #8 The Secret of Twilight Gemini
programme.desc: As Lupin's mentor Don Dolune lies on his deathbed, he hands the master thief a gift: the diamond named Twilight. But it's only half of the treasure-the other half of the Twilight can be found in Morocco…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Notorious gangster, Al Capone left behind five tiles that reveal the location of his massive gold hoard when put together. Out of the five tiles, Lupin and Fujiko have three in their possession.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in South Africa to receive a nautical chart from a retired Nazi that shows the location of a sunken Nazi treasure. However, two young German soldiers interrupt the exchange and a skirmish ensues.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in the small city of San Pico in Central America. However, the city was in the midst of a war between the Government Forces and the Guerilla Army. Leading the Guerilla Army is Jigen's old army pal, Giranco.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Professor Clover reveals a startling and sinister theory about the World Government, Robin reunites with her mother, and a giant joins the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The painful story of Ohara – and Robin’s younger years – draws to a tragic close. Luffy declares war on the World Government, and Robin finally changes her tune!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are ready to begin the fight for Robin, but first, Luffy flashes back to memories of his childhood – and the man who made him want to become a pirate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro remembers the first time he met Luffy, and Usopp recalls the events that led him to join the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s heartbreaking past – and Luffy’s epic battle with Arlong – are recalled in this flashback to the early days of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback sheds light on how Sanji came to join the crew, and Chopper’s backstory is revealed through memories of a visit to a snow-covered island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback reveals Robin’s motives for cooperating with CP9, Nami’s shocking discovery about the archaeologist’s past, and Luffy’s determination to save his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky stands up to Spandam by destroying what the madman desires most, and the sound of the sea train spurs the Straw Hats to make a daring leap of faith!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy races to rescue Robin while the rest of the Straw Hats set off in search of the five keys needed to unlock the archaeologist!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Usopp and Zoro go head-to-head with a couple of animal assassins, Sanji teaches the most beautiful member of CP9 the secrets of making good tea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into trouble trying to sail his way to Robin, Usopp and Zoro end up handcuffed together, and Sanji’s inability to kick a women may lead to serious injury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chimney and Gombe show Luffy the secret passage that leads to Robin, and Franky puts on a display of raw punching power thanks to a few bottles of cola!

programme.desc: While Franky’s brawl spills into the ocean, Usopp and Sanji attempt to overcome their handcuffs by outsmarting their opponents!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!

programme.desc: Ashley (EMILIE ULLERUP) is confronted by the sinister John Druitt (CHRISTOPHER HEYERDAHL) who possesses a powerful force and a baffling knowledge of her mother, Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING).

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Marquette (Lisa Howard) falls victim to an elaborate Jaridian scheme that will forever alter the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) investigate a series of mysterious deaths involving a group of women, led by Sister Margaret (special guest star Marina Sirtis), that has the ability to spiritually bond with the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A live television interview with Zo'or (Anita La Selva) goes awry when a news reporter airs secret Taelon tapes and embarks on a deadly mission that Liam (Robert Leeshock) must thwart.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) must decide whether to save the life of his enemy Zo'or (Anita La Selva), who suffers serious injuries after their shuttle crashes in a remote part of the United States.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zo'or (Anita La Selva) and Sandoval (Von Flores) implement an elaborate plan to assassinate T'than (Michelle Nolden), the Taelon War Minister.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A scientist from the original Commonwealth shows up, caught in a time loop.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Flavin returns, sparking a gang war, and helps Dylan develop as a Paradine.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A crystal that can restore the Andromeda's power is discovered, but in order to get it, Dylan must work for the mine's owner - who uses slave labor.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tunnels are discovered on Seefra which can be used to reach eight other Seefra planets.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When an old man is killed, Beka, Rhade, and Harper are the main suspects and stand trial.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rhade leads the rebels in a battle against a warlord on Seefra-5. A scientist previously thought dead helps Harper rebuild the quantum teleporter.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan discovers that Beka's boyfriend was really Drago Musevini, and he used Beka's DNA to create the Nietzscheans. She is their Alpha Matriarch.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Journalist Maggie Freleng searches for answers in the 2004 disappearance of a nursing student following a car crash in New Hampshire.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Maggie investigates reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home, including a possible pregnancy or an emotional phone call with her sister.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: There are questions about happened to Maura after she crashed on a rural road in New Hampshire: did she run into the woods, hop into a car with someone she knew and escape to a new life in Canada, or worse, hitch a ride with a dangerous stranger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: New Hampshire's law enforcement community keeps their findings of Maura's case close to the chest; Maggie explores the theories related to a police conspiracy, hoping to break down a decade-long code of silence.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Killers and kidnappers are Maggie's focus as she works to find out if Maura Murray was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: The DNA results are revealed; Maggie seeks the advice of a psychic; a wild lead is pursued at the top of a mountain; Maggie sits down with Maura's family and reveals evidence released by law enforcement for the first time in 13 years.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Natalee Holloway disappears from Aruba in May 2005, and her father Dave never stops looking for her; he receives a new lead that could be the key to solving the 12-year-old mystery, but he has suspicions about the source.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Dave Holloway and a team of investigators pursue a lead that may shed light on his daughter's disappearance, with the goal of obtaining a taped confession and concrete evidence.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: The sting operation in New Orleans continues as the investigation team begins running out of time to obtain the necessary information from the co-conspirator.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site; Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ races to the location where the co-conspirator claims he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010; working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: After two years following a lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12-year-old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldon vanishes; investigative reporter, Shawndrea Thomas, and retired deputy Police Chief Joe Delia attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case in the hope of finding justice for Phoenix.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of Phoenix sightings since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated; a surprising lead goes to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously; Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.desc: Mike and Frank challenge Danielle to sell a vintage carnival ride they've been storing for months. Meanwhile, the guys visit a collector with amazing pieces including an old gambling game used to get customers to spend more money.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Determined to uncover a hidden honey hole, the guys are freestyling on their home turf in Iowa.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are cruising around Daytona Beach, and while the sun is shining outside, the van reeks and the hunt is on to find out why. The guys stumble onto a street lined with abandoned businesses and fall head over heels for a girly neon bar sign.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Concerned about slow sales and high expenses, Danielle tells the guys they need to step up their game and make some serious money. Mike and Frank feel the pressure. They uncover lots of great stuff in Tony's sprawling Illinois collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Steve and Antonio welcome a new member to their team, and when they decide to go after a food truck for Steve s wife, Steve is forced to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An 1861 Civil War saber finds its way into the shop--but if it's real, why was the blade never sharpened? Then Rick and the owner of a Chuck Berry autographed Fender guitar find themselves on different pages.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit

programme.title: Armored

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige has an unresolved trauma since she blames herself for the death of her parents in a car wreck.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe is serving on a jury in a murder case, and she is convinced that the defendant is guilty. However, when she touches the murder weapon, she has a premonition of the real killer, who has a Medusa tattooed in his right arm.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When The Seer foresees the demise of The Source by the Halliwell sisters, he decides to break the covenant between good and evil unleashing the ultimate power, the forbidden The Hollow

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Seer foresees that the son of Phoebe and Cole will be very powerful, and The Source, who possessed Cole's body, must bring him to the evil side marrying Phoebe in the dark way, i.e., in a cemetery with a dark priest and drinking the bride's blood.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Seer blends a potion in chocolates to Cole give to Phoebe and conceive a son in the full moon night.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: The Charmed Ones fight a vampire queen who kidnaps Paige and tries to turn her against Piper and Phoebe.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: High school athletes are being coaxed to take a hybrid steroid called Powerballs to enhance their sporting skills. However, the drug takes over their brain and makes them oblivious to danger, causing teems to die from the drug.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A jaded Dragon with a mystical past is stolen by a Chinese gang, believing it really has magical powers. A young man steals the dragon from the gang, thinking it will heal his sister who is in a coma.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Man campaigns to remove the gangs from his neighborhood by using violence against them. It gets worse when his granddaughter is shot in a drive-by. Walker helps the grandfather see that violence is not the answer.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly's assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he's got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Catelynn's anxiety rises when she notices her daughter's head is flat on one side. Jade is nervous to meet Jenelle while Sean shops for an engagement ring. Briana's stress puts a toll on her mental health.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Briana plans a trip to see her estranged father. Cheyenne struggles with the aftermath of the shooting incident. Maci celebrates Bentley's 13th birthday and fears the bowling alley will trigger her PTSD. Catelynn has surgery to remove a cyst.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Leah moves into her new house and is open to having a baby with Jaylan. Cheyenne & Zach decide they need a fresh start and look for a new house. Briana celebrates Stella's graduation and gets Cheyenne's advice on co-parenting when Luis doesn't show up.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Cheyenne supports Cory as his daughter is born with a heart condition. Amber is officially done with her probation. Bentley wants social media but Maci worries about online predators. Briana gets a mental health diagnosis. Catelynn sets new boundaries.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Catelynn invites all the moms to go on a glamping trip in Florida to celebrate Amber's birthday. Maci & Catelynn are surprised when Ashley doesn't join. Amber has a great time but the verdict of her custody case is still looming.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: After Roe v. Wade is overturned, Maci talks to Taylor about getting a vasectomy. Ashley wants to go to nursing school in Vegas but fears the environment will be tough on Bar's sobriety. Catelynn is shocked when she finds out who Briana is dating.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Sean plans a weekend that will change Jade's life forever. Catelynn worries Vaeda has hearing issues while Briana decides it's time to move out of her mom's house. The whole cast is in shock when Amber loses the custody battle for her son James.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: In light of the shootings in Uvalde, Maci talks to her kids about gun violence. Leah is ready to "plan" a pregnancy. Ashley, Bar & Holly move to Nevada. Catelynn is in shock when she has to explain to Nova why she placed Carly up for adoption.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Catelynn is hospitalized so Tyler is left juggling the kids. Amber is shocked with the state Andrew left her house. Jade is emotional on Kloie's first day of school. Cheyenne finds out Cory will be out of town & won't be able to help like he promised.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Briana's boyfriend Bobby visits. Leah talks to her daughters about ways to be proactive since Roe vs Wade was overturned. Maci tries to educate her kids about anti-racism. Cheyenne is frustrated when Zach's learns he may go to jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Amber goes to California to visit her son James. Sean feels pressure to get a job after looking at a wedding venue with Jade. Cheyenne tries to enjoy her bridal shower. Catelynn & Tyler celebrate 16 years together. Jaylan buys a ring to propose to Leah.

programme.title: Teen Mom: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Briana breaks up with beau Bobby. Amber struggles with her new visitation schedule for her son. Cheyenne plans a romantic date with Zach before their wedding. Tyler seeks therapy to help him deal with sexual abuse he experienced as a child.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Memo le daña los frenos al carro de Armando para acabar con él, pero quien se accidenta es otro. A Gabriela le molestan las visitas de Dínora, pero al menos descubre dónde está Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Ruth, le ruega que regrese a casa y ella se niega, Juan le pide que respete esa decisión. Memo planea otro accidente para matar a Armando, esta vez espera no fallar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones de Armando le cuentan al jefe que Rosario está viviendo con Memo, van a buscarla pero ella escapa. Jimena visita a Ruth, le brinda su apoyo incondicional en momentos tan difíciles.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora está en la hacienda, sus matones secuestran a Juan. Gabriela reflexiona y ahora solo quiere la felicidad de Norma, mientras Sara le confiesa a su madre de quién está enamorada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le encarga el vestido de novia de Norma a Leandro, quien se preocupa por su prima Ruth ante las injusticias de Raquel, mientras Óscar y Jimena negocian para salvar su matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando sigue a Sara y escondido, la ve con Franco, por lo que la insulta y le inventa mentiras, ella le da una bofetada y él busca a la aliada perfecta. Ruth defiende a los Reyes y a Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela interroga con insistencia a Fernando sobre el novio de Sara, Rosario le ruega a Franco que vuelva con ella, él le dice a quién ama; Armando da una orden, muy molesto con su esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la hacienda Elizondo, Rosario le jura a Sara que luchará por Franco, Norma interroga a su hermana, quien delante de Jimena, dice que lo ama. Ruth escucha que es adoptada, Raquel le miente.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se percata de los dos hombres que acechan a Franco y responde con rapidez, Ruth, sin saber a dónde ir, huye de casa de Raquel. Dínora busca a Gabriela con otro ardid contra Juan y Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se desvela de la angustia y Eva la consuela, Hortencia se desmaya al ver al fantasma de Libia y pide perdón. Fernando desafía a Sara, al tiempo que Memo cumple la orden de su jefe Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia tiembla porque Libia regresó para vengarse, Manolo confiesa lo sucedido la noche en la que la joven se suicidó tras visitar a los Elizondo. Memo le dice a Armando que mató a Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le cuenta a Norma por qué Ruth los buscó, Jimena está furiosa, piensa que a ella le gusta Óscar. Melisa visita a Raquel acompañada de sus hijos, a la vez que Gabriela aconseja a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams brave bone-chilling temperatures as they come face-to-face with the world famous Matterhorn, and tempers flare in the most intense argument of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams mix it up in Brazil where Racers cry out in pain during a hairy situation as this season comes down to a race to the finish line when one Team will be crowned the winners and receive the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle with an underwater challenge which threatens their positions in the game, and one team’s love for the outdoors comes in handy during a tough climbing challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Fearing they have broken the rules, one team takes a risk that could cost them the Race. Meanwhile, an unwanted speed bump turns into a dream excursion for Liz and Marie, but will it push them even farther back.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After falling to the back of the pack, a disheartened racer is encouraged by the spirit of the local workers, and it’s an intense foot race to the first-ever Pit Stop in Malawi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Malawi where a puzzling patriotic Roadblock causes one team to fall behind. Also, with a Double U-Turn on the line, teams must choose whether to sabotage their fellow Racers for a chance at first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Copenhagen for the first time, where one Racer learns the meaning of two left feet and a double U-turn jeopardizes team positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After a potentially game-changing error, one team hopes for a lucky break, and donning only a Speedo for their Detour task, Racers get in touch with their inner exhibitionists.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers put the pedal to the metal and shift into high gear when they take a thrilling test drive, and results are far from sweet when teams also try to recreate classic Belgian waffles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams make their way to Panama City, where they come face-to-face with their fears as they take in astonishing views of the city skyline.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Jerry Van Dyke, brother of Dick Van Dyke guest stars as a carnival's destitute banjo player. He also proves to be an inept lawman when he is hired in Barney's Fife's absence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's son, Opie, demands that their new housekeeper, Andy's aunt, be fired after the old one leaves to get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives the state troopers a lesson in the efficiency of a county sheriff when a dangerous criminal escapes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to stop a long-time feud between 2 mountain families so their children can get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker sets the men and women of Mayberry against each other when she runs for a seat on the town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney give a Christmas party in the jail for a prisoner and his family, and thereby convert the town scrooge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stranger comes to Mayberry and disrupts the life of the townspeople because he knows everyone's name and business.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer descends on Mayberry and the town proceeds to make itself over in Hollywood's image.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, accused by Andy of being a gossip, sets out to prove that men are bigger gossips than women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, appointed judge of a beauty contest, shows the wisdom of Solomon by picking a popular winner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney finally solve the problem of moonshining in Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to counsel the constantly bickering couple, Fred and Jennie Boone, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy suspects that a traveling record promoter is a con artist and he fears for the townsfolk who invested in his record.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney's over-zealousness causes him to become a laughing stock, Andy tactfully arranges for Barney to regain his status.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A nationally known con man becomes a hero to Aunt Bee, Opie and Barney when he is held for two days in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy plays matchmaker for Barney but finds himself in difficulty when Barney misinterprets his efforts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie struggle to keep house when Aunt Bee leaves for a few days.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finally proposes to Ellie when he becomes convinced that the new young doctor in town is trying to steal his girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town drunk, Otis Campbell, turns out to be the only living descendant of a Revolutionary War hero, much to the dismay of the mayor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A state inspector learns some unique but effective police methods employed by the Mayberry sheriff.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: This beautiful lake in the glen will leave you fully rested and at peace with the world; Bob Ross creates a quiet mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rich, soft colors prove that fall has arrived! Join Bob Ross as he paints a quiet pond and surrounding foliage preparing themselves for a season of slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Spend a half-hour with Bob Ross as he demonstrates the creation of the perfect brown-toned mountain scene - warm and wonderful!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Steve Ross invites you to experience the refreshing beauty of a highland lake and its gentle splashing waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Ferne Sirois shares her own American Indian heritage in this adorable portrait of a playful, smiling little child.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Bob Ross and discover the beauty of a secluded log home with only quiet pond and rustic trees for companionship.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic snow-covered peaks and evergreens loom over lush green grasslands as Bob Ross takes you into his world of natural beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Hike into the mountains with Bob Ross and stumble upon a cozy well-worn shack amidst the solitude of the wilderness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints the very best of nature -- stately evergreens and cool, still waters standing before a glorious brown mountain. A real beauty!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch as the sun comes up into the golden sky and creates an illusion of the calm morning sea in this painting by guest artist Audrey Golden.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the peacefulness of the calm evening as you take a walk with Bob Ross through the enchanted timberlands just before nightfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross along the country back roads as he paints a quiet little home on a meadow with a beautiful, serene sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful mountain painting in an oval - with a surprising twist! - as Bob Ross creates a lonely cabin embraced by lovely lacy bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross finds a barely visible lake being hugged by snowy mountains and some of nature's finest greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Painter Bob Ross invites you to enjoy the last of winter's snowy touch on canvas, as mountains and valleys begin to emerge from their slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Get caught up in the magic as you watch Bob Ross produce a snowy summit and beautiful lake surrounded by shades of greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a leisurely stroll with Bob Ross and gather your thoughts in the quiet misty woodlands; this lovely masterpiece is a great lesson in using the knife.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real viewer favorite, Bob Ross teaches us how to capture the exciting colors of autumn with trees, trees, and trees galore!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a majestic stand of evergreen trees overlooking tiny, sweet little flowers growing on a sloping knoll.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow the old dirt road to that quaint country barn nestled in nature's greenery - Bob Ross paints your destination today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rich colors and abundant softness make this such a beautiful Bob Ross painting; detailed mill and waterwheel make it special.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a clear windless day, where reflections are so smooth they appear to be crystal likenesses of the mountains above.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An interesting way to frame two pictures! Bob Ross paints a mountain landscape from luscious summer to beautiful winter, both on one canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel down an abandoned road with Bob Ross and stumble upon an old weathered barn that has seen better days - what dreams are made of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross into an evening display of glowing, magnificent setting sun. Another unique oval painting you'll have to see.

programme.desc: Carmelo Anthony sets a new Madison Square Garden record by lighting up the Bobcats for 62 points. From Jan. 24, 2014.

programme.title: Hardwood Classics
programme.desc: Dwight Howard scores 40 PTS, leading the Magic to their second-ever Finals appearance in 2009 ECF Gm 6.

programme.title: Hardwood Classics
programme.desc: CP3 overcame injury to lead the Clippers past the Spurs, hitting the winner in the closing seconds of this 2015 Round 1 series.

programme.title: Miami Heat: 2013 Champs

programme.title: Dallas Mavericks: 2011 Champs

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The Pet Collective Specials
programme.desc: Medal-worthy pets show off their impressive, cute and quirky talents in this exciting Chasing Gold special.

programme.title: Animals Undercover

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: Animals are messing up and showing off. Not to mention stopping the traffic, giving advice, and going for a swim.

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: Mischief and mayhem-animals caught in their silliest, sneakiest acts.

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: Pets may flunk out of obedience school; they have other talents, like performing.

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: Who's there? Adorable animals bring laughs, surprises and fun!

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: There are party animals, and then there are party crashers; after dark, all come out.

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: Animals are hitting the road, diving under water, and talking a lot!

programme.title: Animals Undercover

programme.title: Animals Undercover
programme.desc: From the open road to the farm to your own backyard, these animals have plenty to say!

programme.desc: Horses and raccoons; animals do the unexpected.

programme.desc: Animals steal food, ring the doorbell, and show up at work.

programme.desc: Whether it's pitching in around the house or opening the door for their siblings, animals just want to help.
